news.title: SDOH ART Fellowship welcomes its Year 2 fellows to campus
news.outlet: Nell Hodgson Woodruff School of Nursing · LinkedIn
news.excerpt: The NIH-funded SDOH ART Fellowship welcomed its Year 2 fellows to Emory's campus for an intensive, faculty-led in-person training, a welcome dinner with mentors, and a guided campus tour. Directed by Dr. Jill Hamilton, the program equips early- and mid-career researchers to examine how social determinants shape health outcomes.

news.title: Emory School of Nursing taps researchers for social determinants of health fellowship
news.excerpt: Emory's Nell Hodgson Woodruff School of Nursing welcomes its inaugural cohort of SDOH ART fellows, a national group of nurse scientists training to address the social drivers of health.
